options.command: npx bddgen test --config apps/web-e2e/playwright.config.ts && npx playwright test --config apps/web-e2e/playwright.config.ts --output=apps/web-e2e/.playwright-output
powershell -Command "npx bddgen test --config apps/web-e2e/playwright.config.ts; npx playwright test --config apps/web-e2e/playwright.config.ts --ui --output=apps/web-e2e/.playwright-output"
